tagline_zh: 赛博朋克风格的全平台订阅管理工具，用科幻美学重新定义日常订阅追踪。
tagline_en: A cross-platform cyberpunk subscription manager that redefines everyday tracking with sci-fi aesthetics.
description_zh: 赛博生活是一款面向订阅重度用户的全平台管理工具。以赛博朋克为视觉主题，提供订阅追踪、到期提醒、费用统计、芯片墙等特色功能。支持 iCloud 同步与跨平台云同步，让你的订阅数据在所有设备间无缝流转。
description_en: CyberLife is a cross-platform subscription management tool for power users. With a cyberpunk visual theme, it offers subscription tracking, expiry reminders, expense analytics, and a unique chip wall feature. Supports iCloud sync and cross-platform cloud sync across all your devices.

tagline_zh: AI 编程助手 Skills 发现与管理平台，让你的 AI 搭档更强大。
tagline_en: Discover and manage Skills for AI coding assistants — make your AI partner more powerful.
description_zh: SkillPal 是一个 AI 编程助手 Skills 的一站式发现、浏览与管理平台。聚合 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 等多平台 Skills，支持跨平台格式自动转换、一键复制安装，中英双语覆盖全球开发者。
description_en: SkillPal is a one-stop platform for discovering, browsing, and managing Skills for AI coding assistants. Aggregates Skills across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex and more, with automatic cross-platform format conversion, one-click copy & install, and bilingual support.
